description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular military-style toolbox constructed from dark green, weathered wood with visible grain and signs of wear. The box features two sturdy metal handles on the shorter ends, each recessed into the wood for easy carrying. On the front face, there are two prominent metal latches securing the lid, and a large white star emblem is painted in the center, suggesting military or utilitarian use. The top of the box is reinforced with two parallel wooden slats, adding structural strength and durability. The base is slightly elevated by two wooden runners, providing stability and protection from ground moisture. The overall design is utilitarian, robust, and built for heavy-duty use in demanding environments.
description: A weathered, military-style wooden toolbox with metal handles, latches, and a white star emblem on the front. The box is reinforced with wooden slats and shows signs of rugged use.
description_view_0: End view showing a recessed metal handle and the weathered wooden surface, with no visible markings or latches.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two metal latches, a large white star emblem, and the reinforced wooden lid with slats.
description_view_2: Opposite end view mirroring view 0, with a recessed metal handle and no visible markings.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain wooden back, reinforced with metal corner plates and no handles or markings.
attribute_handle_type: Rectangular, recessed steel handles on each short end; folding design for flush storage; utilitarian and robust with no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing steel clasp latches; simple flip-up design, no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_brand_logo: A large white star emblem is painted on the front face, centered between the latches; no readable text or brand name.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied by the box shape; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
attribute_external_labeling: white star emblem on front face
